---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* ── Full-screen reset ── */
  html, body {
    margin: 0; padding: 0;
    height: 100%; width: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
    background: #edf2f7;
  }
  /* Strip Quarto chrome */
  #quarto-content, main.content, .page-full,
  #quarto-document-content { padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; }
  h1.title, .quarto-title-block { display: none !important; }

  /* ── App shell ── */
  .tl-page {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    height: 100vh;
    width: 100vw;
  }

  /* ── Header bar ── */
  .tl-header {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    height: 58px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1a3a5c 0%, #2a5298 100%);
    color: white;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0 1.4rem;
    gap: 1.8rem;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
    z-index: 300;
  }
  .tl-header .tl-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    white-space: nowrap;
    letter-spacing: .01em;
    margin-right: .5rem;
  }
  .tl-header .sep {
    width: 1px; height: 28px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.25);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .legend-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    font-size: .78rem;
    white-space: nowrap;
    opacity: .9;
  }
  .legend-dot {
    width: 13px; height: 13px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .tl-header .hint {
    margin-left: auto;
    font-size: .72rem;
    opacity: .55;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  /* ── Scroll area ── */
  .tl-scroll-wrap {
    flex: 1;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  #tl-scroll {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    overflow-x: auto;
    overflow-y: hidden;
    cursor: grab;
  }
  #tl-scroll:active { cursor: grabbing; }
  #tl-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { height: 6px; }
  #tl-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #a0aec0; border-radius: 3px; }

  /* ── Canvas ── */
  #tl-inner {
    position: relative;
    min-width: 4400px;
    height: 100%;
  }

  /* ── Thick bar ── */
  #tl-bar {
    position: absolute;
    left: 0; right: 0;
    /* top & height set by JS */
    background: #2d3748;
    border-radius: 3px;
  }

  /* ── Year labels ── */
  .tl-yr {
    position: absolute;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,.45);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: .04em;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 5;
    /* top & height matched to bar via JS */
  }
  .tl-yr.active { color: rgba(255,255,255,.85); }

  /* ── Event wrapper ── */
  .tl-event {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; bottom: 0;
    width: 1px;
    z-index: 10;
  }
  .tl-event:hover { z-index: 80; }

  /* ── Dot on bar ── */
  .tl-dot {
    position: absolute;
    width: 15px; height: 15px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    left: -7.5px;
    z-index: 15;
    border: 3px solid #edf2f7;
  }

  /* ── Connector ── */
  .tl-conn {
    position: absolute;
    width: 3px;
    left: -1.5px;
    z-index: 9;
  }

  /* ── Card ── */
  .tl-card {
    position: absolute;
    width: 175px;
    border-radius: 11px;
    padding: 12px 13px;
    color: #fff;
    left: -87px;
    z-index: 20;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.25);
    transition: transform .15s, box-shadow .15s;
    cursor: default;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .tl-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.32);
  }
  .tl-card .c-icon  { font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 5px; display: block; }
  .tl-card .c-title {
    font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.35;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .tl-card .c-inst {
    font-size: 10px; opacity: .75; line-height: 1.3;
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .tl-card .c-year {
    font-size: 10px; opacity: .55; font-weight: 700;
  }

  /* ── Detail panel ── */
  .tl-detail {
    position: absolute;
    width: 260px;
    background: #fff;
    color: #222;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    font-size: 11.5px;
    line-height: 1.55;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.22);
    z-index: 200;
    opacity: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity .15s ease;
    left: 96px;
  }
  .tl-detail.flip { left: auto; right: 96px; }
  .tl-event:hover .tl-detail { opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto; }
  .tl-detail .d-accent {
    height: 4px; border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
    margin: -14px -16px 11px;
  }
  .tl-detail .d-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; margin-bottom: 6px; color: #1a3a5c; line-height:1.3; }
  .tl-detail .d-authors { font-size: 10.5px; color: #555; margin-bottom: 3px; }
  .tl-detail .d-journal { font-style: italic; color: #666; margin-bottom: 6px; font-size: 11px; }
  .tl-detail .d-inst    { font-size: 10.5px; color: #777; margin-bottom: 7px; }
  .tl-detail .d-body    { color: #333; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .tl-detail .d-pmid    { font-size: 10px; color: #aaa; }

  /* ── Colors ── */
  .bg-grant     { background: #1a3a5c; }
  .bg-pub       { background: #c0392b; }
  .bg-ramirez   { background: #6c3483; }
  .bg-milestone { background: #1a7a4a; }

  /* ── Scroll arrows ── */
  .tl-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
    width: 42px; height: 42px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(45,55,72,.72);
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 18px;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    z-index: 400;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: background .2s;
  }
  .tl-arrow:hover { background: rgba(45,55,72,.95); }
  .tl-arrow.left  { left: 10px; }
  .tl-arrow.right { right: 10px; }
</style>

<div class="tl-page">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="tl-header">
    <div class="tl-title">HCC Research &mdash; Grants &amp; Key Publications &mdash; Texas 2009&ndash;2025</div>
    <div class="sep"></div>
    <div class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#1a3a5c"></span>CPRIT Grant</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#c0392b"></span>Publication</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#6c3483"></span>Ramirez Lab</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#1a7a4a"></span>Milestone</div>
    <div class="hint">Drag or use arrows &nbsp;|&nbsp; Hover card for detail</div>
  </div>

  <!-- Timeline -->
  <div class="tl-scroll-wrap">
    <button class="tl-arrow left"  onclick="tlScroll(-500)">&#8592;</button>
    <button class="tl-arrow right" onclick="tlScroll(500)">&#8594;</button>
    <div id="tl-scroll">
      <div id="tl-inner">
        <div id="tl-bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
(function () {
  var EVENTS = [
    { year:2009, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'CPRIT Established — First Grants Awarded',
      inst:'Statewide, Texas',
      body:'Voters approved Prop 15 authorizing <b>$3B</b> for cancer research. BCM and MD Anderson liver researchers were early recipients, launching Texas\'s HCC infrastructure.' },
    { year:2011, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'Hepatocellular Carcinoma',
      authors:'El-Serag HB',
      journal:'N Engl J Med 2011;365:1118–1127',
      inst:'Baylor College of Medicine / Houston VA',
      pmid:'21992124',
      body:'Landmark global HCC review documenting the rapid rise of HCV-related HCC as the fastest-growing cause of US cancer deaths.' },
    { year:2012, type:'ramirez', emoji:'🔬',
      title:'HCC Incidence & Risk Factors in TX Latinos',
      authors:'Ramirez AG et al.',
      journal:'PLoS One 2012;7(4):e35573',
      inst:'UTHSCSA / IHPR, San Antonio',
      pmid:'22530052',
      body:'First study documenting South Texas Latinos have the nation\'s highest HCC rates (10.6/100K). Identified obesity and diabetes as key modifiable risk factors.' },
    { year:2012, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'Epidemiology of Viral Hepatitis and HCC',
      authors:'El-Serag HB',
      journal:'Gastroenterology 2012;142(6):1264–1273',
      inst:'Baylor College of Medicine',
      pmid:'22537432',
      body:'Quantified population-attributable fraction of HBV/HCV in HCC; foundational for Texas public health interventions.' },
    { year:2014, type:'ramirez', emoji:'🔬',
      title:'HCC in TX Latinos 1995–2010: An Update',
      authors:'Ramirez AG et al.',
      journal:'PLoS One 2014;9(6):e99365',
      inst:'UTHSCSA / IHPR, San Antonio',
      pmid:'24915432',
      body:'Confirmed TX Latino male/female HCC rates <b>3.1× and 4.0×</b> higher than non-Hispanic Whites.' },
    { year:2015, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'RP150587 — Texas HCC Consortium (THCCC) ~$6M',
      inst:'BCM / UTSW / MD Anderson / UT San Antonio',
      body:'CPRIT Multi-Investigator Award launching the <b>THCCC</b> — 5,000-patient prospective cohort at 5 Texas centers for HCC risk factors and early detection biomarkers.' },
    { year:2017, type:'ramirez', emoji:'🔬',
      title:'Lifestyle & Clinical Correlates of HCC — Aflatoxin',
      authors:'Ramirez AG et al.',
      journal:'Clin Gastroenterol Hepatol 2018;16(3):373–380',
      inst:'UTHSCSA / IHPR, San Antonio',
      pmid:'28344065',
      body:'<b>First U.S. study linking aflatoxin exposure to HCC in a Latino-majority population.</b> Cases had 6× higher odds of detectable aflatoxins in blood.' },
    { year:2017, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'AFP + Ultrasound for HCC Detection: Meta-Analysis',
      authors:'Singal AG et al.',
      journal:'Gastroenterology 2018;154(6):1706–1718',
      inst:'UT Southwestern, Dallas',
      pmid:'29352041',
      body:'32 studies: AFP + ultrasound improves HCC sensitivity to 63% vs 45% for ultrasound alone. Basis for updated AASLD surveillance guidelines.' },
    { year:2018, type:'milestone', emoji:'🎯',
      title:'THCCC Cohort — 2,000+ Patients Enrolled',
      inst:'BCM / UTSW / MD Anderson / UT San Antonio',
      body:'Semi-annual ultrasound, AFP, labs, and biospecimens collected across 5 Texas sites. One of the largest prospective HCC biomarker repositories in the US.' },
    { year:2018, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'Epidemiology and Management of HCC',
      authors:'Singal AG; El-Serag HB et al.',
      journal:'Gastroenterology 2018;154(6):1693–1704',
      inst:'UT Southwestern / BCM',
      body:'Comprehensive review of HCC risk stratification, surveillance, staging, and treatment. Addressed NAFLD/NASH-HCC epidemic and rising rates in Hispanic populations.' },
    { year:2019, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'TeCH Center CAP Round 1 — $13M',
      inst:'BCM / MD Anderson, Texas',
      body:'CPRIT Collaborative Award establishing the Texas Collaborative Center for HCC (TeCH), coordinating statewide HCC research.' },
    { year:2019, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'RP190641 El-Serag Biomarker Validation — $3M',
      inst:'BCM Houston',
      body:'Biomarker validation grant for HCC early detection research within the THCCC cohort.' },
    { year:2019, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'Hwang MDA Patient-Centered Prevention — $2.46M',
      inst:'MD Anderson Cancer Center',
      body:'Patient-centered liver cancer prevention initiative targeting at-risk populations at MD Anderson.' },
    { year:2019, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'THCCC Cohort Study Design',
      authors:'Loo N; El-Serag HB; Singal AG et al.',
      journal:'Am J Gastroenterol 2019;114(3):530–532',
      inst:'BCM / UTSW / MD Anderson / UT San Antonio',
      pmid:'30699099',
      body:'Describes the THCCC 5,000-patient prospective cohort design and multi-center data collection protocol.' },
    { year:2019, type:'ramirez', emoji:'🔬',
      title:'Metformin Modifies HCC Disparity in Diabetic Men',
      authors:'Wang CP; Ramirez AG et al.',
      journal:'Cancer Med 2019;8(6):3206–3215',
      inst:'UTHSCSA, San Antonio (VA Study)',
      pmid:'30993905',
      body:'In 84,433 men with T2D, metformin was associated with reduced HCC risk, with stronger effects in Hispanic and African American men.' },
    { year:2020, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'RP200537 Singal UTSW — $2.5M',
      inst:'UT Southwestern, Dallas',
      body:'3,000-patient cirrhosis cohort developing biomarker-based HCC surveillance algorithms.' },
    { year:2020, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'RP200554 Thrift BCM — $2.47M',
      inst:'BCM Houston',
      body:'Genetic epidemiology of HCC in Hispanics; focused on PNPLA3 and TM6SF2 variants.' },
    { year:2020, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'Epidemiology & Surveillance for HCC: New Trends',
      authors:'Singal AG et al.',
      journal:'J Hepatol 2020;72(2):250–261',
      inst:'UT Southwestern, Dallas',
      pmid:'31954490',
      body:'Documents shift from viral hepatitis to NAFLD/NASH as dominant HCC etiology; projects <b>122% increase</b> in NAFLD-HCC by 2030.' },
    { year:2020, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'AGA Update: HCC Surveillance in NAFLD',
      authors:'Singal AG; El-Serag HB',
      journal:'Gastroenterology 2020;158(7):1822–1830',
      inst:'UT Southwestern / BCM',
      body:'Joint AGA expert review on HCC screening in the rapidly growing NAFLD population. Addresses surveillance intervals and novel biomarkers.' },
    { year:2022, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'PP220022 Community HCC Prevention — $1.96M',
      inst:'UT Health Texas',
      body:'Community-based HCC prevention at safety-net clinics targeting underserved Texas populations.' },
    { year:2022, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'RP220119 GALAD + AFP-L3 Validation — $2M',
      inst:'BCM Houston',
      body:'Validation of GALAD score and AFP-L3 as early detection biomarkers within the THCCC cohort.' },
    { year:2022, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'TeCH Center CAP Round 2 — ~$18M',
      inst:'BCM / MD Anderson / UTSW / UTHealth',
      body:'TeCH Center renewal expanding NASH-HCC research and health equity initiatives across Texas institutions.' },
    { year:2022, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'HCC Surveillance Improves Outcomes: Meta-Analysis',
      authors:'Singal AG et al.',
      journal:'J Hepatol 2022;77(1):128–139',
      inst:'UT Southwestern, Dallas',
      pmid:'35139400',
      body:'59 studies / 145,396 patients: Surveillance yields 1.86× early-stage detection and <b>33% mortality reduction</b> (HR 0.67).' },
    { year:2022, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'The Texas Collaborative Center for HCC (TeCH)',
      authors:'Harrison AC; El-Serag HB et al.',
      journal:'Front Oncol 2022',
      inst:'BCM / MD Anderson / UTSW / UTHealth',
      pmid:'36059708',
      body:"Describes TeCH's multi-institutional research, education, and advocacy framework targeting reduction of Texas liver cancer mortality by 2030." },
    { year:2023, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'Lopez-Terrada TCH Pediatric HCC — $5.98M',
      inst:"Texas Children's Hospital",
      body:'Predictive biomarkers for pediatric HCC and hepatoblastoma.' },
    { year:2023, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'Zhong UTSW HCC Mechanisms — $1.05M',
      inst:'UT Southwestern, Dallas',
      body:'Investigation of molecular mechanisms driving HCC progression and therapeutic targets.' },
    { year:2023, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'Prevention of HCC — White Paper',
      authors:'TeCH Consortium',
      journal:'Hepatol Commun 2023',
      inst:'TeCH Multi-Institution Consortium',
      pmid:'PMC10524305',
      body:'Consensus recommendations covering HBV vaccination, HCV cure, metabolic intervention, and health equity strategies for Hispanic Texas communities.' },
    { year:2024, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'HES v2.0 Outperforms GALAD for HCC Detection',
      authors:'El-Serag HB; Jin M et al.',
      journal:'Hepatology 2024',
      inst:'Baylor College of Medicine / THCCC Network',
      body:'Phase 3 biomarker evaluation: HES v2.0 (AFP + AFP-L3 + DCP + clinical variables) demonstrated superior sensitivity and specificity over GALAD for early HCC detection.' },
    { year:2025, type:'milestone', emoji:'🎯',
      title:'CPRIT Surpasses $4B + UTSW NCI Liver Cancer SPORE',
      inst:'UTSW / BCM / MD Anderson, Texas',
      body:'CPRIT surpasses $4B total (~$59–77M to liver cancer). UT Southwestern receives the <b>first Texas NCI SPORE for Liver Cancer</b> with Singal, Yopp et al.' }
  ];

  var COLOR = { grant:'#1a3a5c', pub:'#c0392b', ramirez:'#6c3483', milestone:'#1a7a4a' };

  /* ── Layout constants ── */
  var MIN_YEAR = 2009, SPAN = 16;
  var CANVAS_W = 4400, PAD = 240;
  var USABLE   = CANVAS_W - PAD * 2;
  var BAR_H    = 52;

  function xFor(yr) { return PAD + ((yr - MIN_YEAR) / SPAN) * USABLE; }

  /* ── Same-year x-jitter ── */
  var groups = {};
  EVENTS.forEach(function(e, i) { (groups[e.year] = groups[e.year] || []).push(i); });
  EVENTS.forEach(function(e, i) {
    var g = groups[e.year], pos = g.indexOf(i);
    e._xOff = (pos - (g.length - 1) / 2) * 195;
  });

  /* ── Wait for layout so we can read real height ── */
  window.addEventListener('load', function () {
    var area   = document.getElementById('tl-scroll');
    var inner  = document.getElementById('tl-inner');
    var bar    = document.getElementById('tl-bar');
    var H      = area.clientHeight;
    var barTop = Math.round(H * 0.44);

    bar.style.top    = barTop + 'px';
    bar.style.height = BAR_H  + 'px';

    var dotCenterY    = barTop + Math.round(BAR_H / 2);
    var cardAboveTop  = 16;
    var cardAboveH    = barTop - 16 - 28;   /* 28px connector gap */
    var connAboveTop  = cardAboveTop + cardAboveH;
    var connAboveH    = barTop - connAboveTop;

    var cardBelowTop  = barTop + BAR_H + 16;
    var cardBelowH    = H - cardBelowTop - 16;
    var connBelowTop  = barTop + BAR_H;
    var connBelowH    = cardBelowTop - connBelowTop;

    /* ── Year labels ── */
    var activeYrs = {};
    EVENTS.forEach(function(e) { activeYrs[e.year] = true; });
    for (var yr = MIN_YEAR; yr <= MIN_YEAR + SPAN; yr++) {
      var lbl = document.createElement('div');
      lbl.className = 'tl-yr' + (activeYrs[yr] ? ' active' : '');
      lbl.style.left   = xFor(yr) + 'px';
      lbl.style.top    = barTop + 'px';
      lbl.style.height = BAR_H + 'px';
      lbl.textContent  = yr;
      inner.appendChild(lbl);
    }

    /* ── Render events ── */
    EVENTS.forEach(function(e, i) {
      var above = (i % 2 === 0);
      var x     = xFor(e.year) + e._xOff;
      var col   = COLOR[e.type] || '#555';

      var wrap = document.createElement('div');
      wrap.className = 'tl-event';
      wrap.style.left = x + 'px';

      /* dot */
      var dot = document.createElement('div');
      dot.className = 'tl-dot';
      dot.style.background = col;
      dot.style.top = (dotCenterY - 7) + 'px';
      wrap.appendChild(dot);

      /* connector */
      var conn = document.createElement('div');
      conn.className = 'tl-conn';
      conn.style.background = col;
      if (above) {
        conn.style.top    = connAboveTop + 'px';
        conn.style.height = connAboveH   + 'px';
      } else {
        conn.style.top    = connBelowTop + 'px';
        conn.style.height = connBelowH   + 'px';
      }
      wrap.appendChild(conn);

      /* card */
      var card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = 'tl-card bg-' + e.type;
      card.style.top    = (above ? cardAboveTop : cardBelowTop) + 'px';
      card.style.height = (above ? cardAboveH   : cardBelowH)   + 'px';
      card.innerHTML =
        '<span class="c-icon">' + e.emoji + '</span>' +
        '<div class="c-title">' + e.title + '</div>' +
        '<div class="c-inst">'  + (e.inst || '') + '</div>' +
        '<div class="c-year">'  + e.year + '</div>';
      wrap.appendChild(card);

      /* detail panel */
      var det = document.createElement('div');
      det.className = 'tl-detail' + (x > CANVAS_W * 0.62 ? ' flip' : '');
      det.style.top = (above ? cardAboveTop : cardBelowTop) + 'px';
      var dh = '<div class="d-accent" style="background:' + col + '"></div>';
      dh += '<div class="d-title">' + e.emoji + ' ' + e.title + '</div>';
      if (e.authors) dh += '<div class="d-authors"><strong>Authors:</strong> ' + e.authors + '</div>';
      if (e.journal) dh += '<div class="d-journal">' + e.journal + '</div>';
      if (e.inst)    dh += '<div class="d-inst">📍 ' + e.inst + '</div>';
      dh += '<div class="d-body">' + e.body + '</div>';
      if (e.pmid)    dh += '<div class="d-pmid">PMID: ' + e.pmid + '</div>';
      det.innerHTML = dh;
      wrap.appendChild(det);

      inner.appendChild(wrap);
    });

    /* ── Drag to scroll ── */
    var isDown = false, startX, scrollLeft;
    area.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
      isDown = true; startX = e.pageX - area.offsetLeft; scrollLeft = area.scrollLeft;
    });
    area.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { isDown = false; });
    area.addEventListener('mouseup',    function() { isDown = false; });
    area.addEventListener('mousemove',  function(e) {
      if (!isDown) return;
      e.preventDefault();
      area.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - (e.pageX - area.offsetLeft - startX);
    });
  });

  window.tlScroll = function(dx) {
    document.getElementById('tl-scroll').scrollBy({ left: dx, behavior: 'smooth' });
  };
})();
</script>
```
